text.title: six-core-principles Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for six-core-principles as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent synthesizes the audit and the recommendation in the same prompt turn.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Produces confirmation bias; the reviewer unconsciously justifies their pre-formed recommendation through audit language.

failure-mode.description: Agent equates "Embed Quality" exclusively with adding tests.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Process quality (review rigor, observability, runbooks) is equally within scope; test-only framing misses systemic quality gaps.

failure-mode.description: Agent skips "Integrate Sustainability" because it seems irrelevant to tech work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cloud carbon, data retention periods, and accessibility all count as sustainability dimensions in PMBOK 7; skipping produces an incomplete audit.
